texts: Explain angular momentum. The angular momentum of a particle about a point \(O\) is defined as \(\vec{r} \times \vec{p}\) where \(\\vec{r}\) is the particle's position vector relative to \(O\) and \(\vec{p}\) is its linear momentum.
